direct_evidence.quote: The Action: Star this Repository on GitHub. The Reward: Supporter Role in Discord.
direct_evidence.verification: The same document asks users to submit a screenshot as proof of the star action.

expected_signal_constraints.basis: A social reward is explicitly conditional on starring the repository.

cases.alternative_explanation: The program is framed as community onboarding, but the social reward is explicitly conditional on starring.

direct_evidence.quote: We will award the first 10 pieces of feedback that add value and are accepted by our team with exclusive swag.
direct_evidence.verification: The request to star the repository is separate from the acceptance-based feedback reward.

expected_signal_constraints.basis: The reward condition is accepted feedback, while the star request is separate.

cases.alternative_explanation: A nearby giveaway and star request do not establish reward-for-star when the reward condition is accepted feedback.

label_policy: Add suspicious/manipulated cases only when direct public evidence is recorded beside the label. Preserve negative controls where incentives exist but are not conditional on stars.
